info.title: Care Episode Service API
info.description: Care episodes, demo recoveries, records, appointments, inbox messages, and patient chat proxy.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Case-insensitive filter across procedure name, specialty, EMR reference, and type.

200.description: Paginated audit history for a patient's care episodes or rolling risk evaluations

post.description: Validates an active care episode recovery, merges optional client-supplied patient_display_name into interaction context, and creates a chat interaction via service-to-service call. Does not call Chat when no recovery exists.

404.description: No active care episode recovery for patient

post.summary: Proxy a patient chat completion turn
post.description: Forwards the patient JWT to Chat for session start or message completions after validating the care episode recovery.

404.description: No active care episode recovery for patient

version.description: Service semver from pyproject at install/build time.

risk_summary.description: Latest rolling chat risk summary for this patient, when available.

closed_at.description: When status is closed, the audit-maintained changed_at timestamp from the close update. Omitted when active.

care_window_days.description: Post-discharge monitoring window length in days from procedure date. Defaults to 30 when omitted on create.

reactivate.description: When true on a closed episode, archives the prior discharge and starts a new procedure. Rejected when an active episode exists.

care_window_days.description: Post-discharge monitoring window length in days. Applied on create; updatable on the active recovery.
Post-discharge monitoring window length in days. Defaults to 30 when omitted.

closed_at.description: When status is closed, the audit-maintained changed_at timestamp from the close update. Omitted when active.

care_window_days.description: Post-discharge monitoring window length in days for this episode.

summary.description: Rolling clinical risk summary after the evaluated chat turn.

care_window_days.description: Post-discharge monitoring window length in days for this episode.

care_episode_uuid.description: Active care episode identifier. In the demo recovery model this equals patient_uuid.

session_start.description: When true, primes the interaction with an AI greeting.

content.description: Patient message text; required unless session_start is true.

channel.description: Chat channel enum value forwarded to Chat.

patient_display_name.description: Optional greeting name supplied by the client for chat context and risk evaluation.
Optional patient greeting name for the care assistant.

ChatCompletionProxyResponse.description: Opaque completion payload returned by Chat (messages, intervention flag, etc.).
